objective: Retire the machine-local Ed25519 review-signing ceremony as workflow/framework conflation: the M0 review anchor becomes an unsigned hash chain (ioi.m0.review_epoch_anchor.v3) whose sequences 1-6 are retained verbatim as immutable legacy claims and whose new epochs declare authorship_binding: self_declared_unsigned; the bounded agency framework's authority model (wallet-network grants, sealed intents, receipts) remains the only owner of real cryptographic authority.
falsifiable_claim: Tampering any retained claim breaks the predecessor chain and repository baseline pin; an unsigned entry cannot impersonate a verified signer; a legacy-shaped entry cannot follow the unsigned era; tampered head commitments and predecessor substitutions fail before attestation.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: m0-program-control adversarial suite 56/56 after rework (tamper, impersonation, ghost-legacy, head-commitment, predecessor-substitution, rollback-collapse, and same-day-fork cases all fail closed); full check:pre-next-leg green at 0c5e5c558.
remaining_nonclaims: The anchor is development-workflow integrity evidence only; it establishes no authorship, no accepted-head currentness, and no rollback resistance between coherent snapshots.
This cut closes no M0 stage semantics; the M0 exit claim is unchanged in scope.
source_provenance: User decision 2026-07-22 (workflow-vs-framework de-conflation); commit 0c5e5c558 on PR #97.
